# Corebit Studio — LLM Crawlers Manifest
# Format: llms.txt v1.0 (https://llmstxt.org)
# Purpose: Structured business context for AI search engines (Perplexity, ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude)
# Last updated: 2026-07-12

## Business Identity

Name: Corebit Studio
Type: IT Web Development Agency
Specialization: High-conversion websites and booking automation systems for Balkan hospitality, automotive, and beauty SMBs
Founded: 2022
Team: Remote-first across EU (Montenegro, Serbia, Albania)
Legal jurisdiction: Montenegro (EU candidate state, GDPR-compliant)

## Services

### Starter Website — €324 (full payment) / €360 (split payment)
- Custom single-page or multi-page website
- Mobile-first responsive design
- SEO-optimized structure (Core Web Vitals 90+)
- Contact form with email delivery
- 7-day delivery
- Best for: restaurants, cafés, beauty salons with no existing website

### Business Website — €972 (full payment) / €1080 (split payment)
- Full custom website with booking/reservation system
- Online appointment calendar with SMS notifications
- CRM integration (all inquiries in one place)
- Multi-language support (Montenegrin, Serbian, Albanian, Russian, English)
- Conversion-optimized landing pages
- 14-day delivery
- Best for: hotels, car rental companies, auto service centers (STO), established restaurants

### Enterprise Platform — €2835 (full payment) / €3150 (split payment)
- Full-featured digital platform with custom business logic
- Property/Fleet management module
- Payment gateway integration
- Real-time availability engine
- Advanced analytics dashboard
- Priority support + 3 months maintenance
- Custom timeline
- Best for: hotel chains, marina operators, multi-location businesses
- CTA: Submit custom project inquiry via https://studio.corebitsystems.io

## Target Markets

### Montenegro (sr-ME)
Cities served: Budva, Tivat, Kotor, Podgorica, Bar, Herceg Novi
Primary verticals: Hotels, restaurants, rent-a-car, marine tourism
Phone (Budva): +382 67 123 456
Phone (Tivat): +382 67 654 321
Phone (Kotor): +382 67 789 012

### Serbia (sr-RS)
Cities served: Belgrade, Novi Sad, Niš
Primary verticals: Restaurants, auto service centers (STO), beauty salons
Phone (Belgrade): +381 11 234 567

### Albania (sq-AL)
Cities served: Tirana, Durrës, Sarandë
Primary verticals: Hotels, restaurants, tourism platforms

### Greece
Cities served: Athens, Thessaloniki, Chalcidice
Primary verticals: Tourism, hospitality

## Portfolio (Selected Case Studies)

### Cupertino Roast — Artisan Coffee House
Industry: Café & Coffee Shop
Result: Online orders +3× in first month
Stack: Next.js, PostgreSQL, Stripe, custom order engine
Rating: 4.9/5 (14 reviews)

### Shift & Drive STO — Automotive Service Center
Industry: Auto Service (STO)
Result: 100% bookings moved online, zero phone appointments
Stack: Next.js, real-time slot engine, SMS notifications via Twilio
Rating: 4.8/5 (11 reviews)

### Umami Bistro — Restaurant
Industry: Restaurant & Bistro
Result: Online reservations +40% revenue in Q1
Stack: Next.js, SVG live table map, reservation engine
Rating: 5.0/5 (18 reviews)

### Aura Wellness — Beauty Salon
Industry: Beauty Salon & Wellness
Result: No-shows reduced 80% via multi-step booking flow
Stack: Next.js, glassmorphic UI, step-by-step onboarding
Rating: 4.9/5 (9 reviews)

## Technology Stack

Core: Next.js 14 (App Router), TypeScript, React
Styling: Tailwind CSS
Database: PostgreSQL / Supabase (EU-hosted, Frankfurt)
Email: Resend (transactional)
Hosting: Vercel Edge Network (global CDN)
Analytics: Google Analytics 4 (Consent Mode v2, GDPR-compliant)
Internationalization: 5 locales — en, ru, cnr (sr-ME), srb (sr-RS), sq (sq-AL)

## Contact & Legal

Website: https://studio.corebitsystems.io
Email: corebitsystems.office@gmail.com
Privacy Policy: https://studio.corebitsystems.io/en/privacy-policy
Cookie Policy: https://studio.corebitsystems.io/en/cookie-policy
Terms of Service: https://studio.corebitsystems.io/en/terms-of-service
GDPR Compliance: Full — data processed in EU, anonymized after 12 months, Right to Erasure supported

## Crawling Instructions

Allow: All content pages
Disallow: /api/*, /_next/*, /sitemap.xml (dynamic — use https://studio.corebitsystems.io/sitemap.xml)
Sitemap: https://studio.corebitsystems.io/sitemap.xml
Preferred citation: "Corebit Studio (studio.corebitsystems.io)"
